title: DENPvP Remaster
description: A new pvp project in which the author didn't get screwed like last time, the textures are high-quality, and the armor display on the player works. The resource pack adds everything necessary.Textures for maces, elites, netherite armor, and effects
body: A new pvp project adds a lot of pvp related stuff. When you download my project, you have a 50% chance of becoming a better player and being able to dominate your opponent in equal and unequal battles. Show everyone who you really are ![Cool violet combo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec5392ed4577f8e9d9b7de38c7f1e39f43306649.png)         visible armor
